'''Veloc''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Velm]]. The first of two [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giants]] in the [[Velm system]],<ref name="Velmor Part 1" /> it was located in the [[Halori sector/Legends|Halori sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Veloc was orbited by thirty-three [[Moon/Legends|moons]], 281 [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] moonlets, and a [[Planetary ring/Legends|planetary ring]].<ref name="Velmor Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Veloc was mentioned in ''[[Velmor: Royalty and Rebellion]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] source article written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[March 6]], [[2003]] for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Velmor Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' later placed the Velm [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thereby Veloc, in grid square P-7.<ref name="TEA" />
